name: DeepFRI
description: Predict function (GO-term/EC-number) using protein language model. Supports multiple ontologies: Molecular Function, Biological Process, Cellular Component, Enzyme Commission.
capabilities: Predict function (GO-term/EC-number) using protein language model
Supports multiple ontologies: Molecular Function, Biological Process, Cellular Component, Enzyme Commission

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for function prediction

ontology.description: Ontology to predict: 'mf' (Molecular Function), 'bp' (Biological Process), 'cc' (Cellular Component), 'ec' (Enzyme Commission)
